Immediate scope reduction and blocker resolution required.

Merge LOY-11866 immediately to unblock Project Quack development across multiple teams
Conduct emergency review of completely stalled teams (Tender, Dining, Propel, Cobrand) and reassign or descope their work
Implement daily blocker review process with escalation paths for service dependencies
Consider splitting release scope - move pricing-dependent features to future release to unblock current deliverables
